notes: These are the scene families that still need dedicated AI-generated sky backgrounds.
Prompts are written to match the current app style: sky-focused, atmospheric, high quality, no buildings, no people, no text.

targets.prompt: Wide weather app background, mostly cloudy midday sky, dense layered cloud cover with only small patches of muted blue, soft natural light, realistic atmospheric depth, no ground objects, no buildings, no people, no text, photorealistic, clean composition for UI background.

Wide weather app background, fully overcast daytime sky, thick heavy stratiform clouds, dramatic gray tonal variation, moody but readable, realistic sky texture, no land features, no buildings, no people, no text, photorealistic, polished background image.

Wide weather app background, early morning mostly cloudy sky, cool pale light, large cloud banks with minimal blue gaps, soft horizon glow, realistic cloud depth, no houses, no skyline, no people, no text, photorealistic.

Wide weather app background, rainy overcast daytime sky, heavy dark rain clouds, visible distant rainfall curtains, moody atmospheric depth, realistic wet-weather light, no foreground objects, no buildings, no people, no text, photorealistic.

Wide weather app background, cloudy rainy daytime sky, thick stormy cloud layers, intermittent rainfall in the distance, cool gray-blue palette, realistic weather atmosphere, no city elements, no people, no text, photorealistic.
